name: The Time Is Now
description: This isn’t just an album. It’s a journey through real moments — where innocence gives way to awareness, where struggle leads to surrender, and where faith becomes something steady. Each chapter unfolds with intention. Each song carries meaning. This is “The Time Is Now,” experienced as it was lived.
mood_tags: cinematic, reflective, emotional, grounded, vulnerable, hopeful, spiritual, transformative, devotional, acoustic
intro_hint: Introduce this as a guided, sequential experience. Encourage the listener to move through it from beginning to end without rushing.
starter_prompts: ["Create a full, chapter-based journey through this experience, moving from beginning to end, with introductions before each song and time to reflect between them.","Walk me through this experience as a story, introducing each chapter and song before it plays, and explaining the meaning behind each moment.","Give me a slow, reflective experience with these songs, introducing each one before it plays and allowing space between tracks to think and process."]

visual_scene.background: Minimal, grounded environment with soft ambient light, neutral tones, and subtle depth — calm, cinematic, and unobtrusive, designed to let each moment unfold naturally.

items.collection_metadata: {"intro":"","mood_tags":"reflective, introspective, emotional, grounded, honest, contemplative, personal, slow, atmospheric, late-night","intro_hint":"Love arrived before wisdom did. These were the years of learning that feeling deeply does not guarantee permanence. The ache of holding on. The silence after goodbye. Youth met consequence — and something in me changed.","icon":"book"}

collection_content.title: Holding On
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"When you love someone so deeply that letting go feels like losing yourself. This song captures the desperate hope that things will somehow be okay.","year":1999,"release_date":"2026-04-15","album_track_order":3,"version_type":"final","full_story":"After graduating college in 1996 and moving to Boston to start my career, I was living simply in a small sunroom in Roslindale, MA with little more than a mattress on the floor when I met a girl at a hometown Thanksgiving party in 1998. We tried to build a long-distance relationship while she finished her last year of college, but the strain of being four hours apart caught up with us. One late night phone call turned into a fight and a breakup that left me heartbroken and alone, and in that quiet moment I wrote “Holding On.” Although we eventually found our way back to each other and moved to Florida together in 1999, that fragile season — and the emotions it stirred — became the foundation of this song.","lyrics":"It’s three in the morning this time
And I just hung up the phone
I’m trying hard to find peace of mind

Well things didn’t go so well
And I find myself alone
Reflecting on the times when it was just me

So I get down on my knees to pray
In hopes that
Our love will find a way
To make it through every day

It’s been a long time since then
And my memories fade goodbye
Of all the times we did share
So please I hope you know
That I did try I gave it my all

So I get down on my knees to pray
In hopes that
Our love will find a way
To make it through every day

And the roads’ been long and windy now
Holding on
Holding on
Holding on

And the roads’ been long and windy now
Holding on
Holding on
Holding on

And the roads’ been long and windy now
Holding on
Holding on
Holding on 

It’s three in the morning 
And I’m sitting here all alone","lrc_lyrics":"[00:07.86][Verse 1]

collection_content.title: Without You (Acoustic)
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"This song was written in the quiet aftermath of a relationship that slowly unraveled. It captures the feeling of being left alone, trying to understand how something that once felt certain could disappear so quietly.","year":2000,"release_date":"2026-04-15","album_track_order":5,"version_type":"final","full_story":"This was written during a season when everything felt like it was shifting beneath my feet. I had relocated to Florida for a new opportunity and brought someone with me, believing we were building something that would last. What was meant to be a fresh start slowly unraveled. When the relationship ended, I found myself alone in a small apartment in Boynton Beach, far from family and far from anything familiar — trying to make sense of how something that once felt certain could disappear so quietly.","lyrics":"I don’t know if you’re sitting all alone
As this heart wanders its way back home
And I don’t know if you’re thinking about those days
Cause this heart’s trying to find its way
Without you
Without you

And now I step out for the rest of my life
I’m contemplating all these lonely nights
And I can’t imagine the woman you’ve become
Cause I’m still that man you were once dreaming of
Without you

I can’t stop now, no
Cause time is running out on me
Oh baby, can’t you see
I can’t stop now, no
Cause love is walking out that door	
And it won’t be here anymore
Without you

Life is still the same
Without you
And everything remains
Without you
Well I can’t afford the pain
And there’s no one left to blame
Without you
Without you

I can’t stop now, no
Cause time is running out on me
Oh baby, can’t you see
I can’t stop now, no
Cause love is walking out that door	
And it won’t be here
And it won’t be here
And it won’t be here anymore
Without you
Life is still the same
And everything remains
Without you

I can’t stop now, no
Cause time is running out on me
Oh baby, can’t you see
I can’t stop now, no
Cause love is walking out that door	
And it won’t be here anymore
Without you
I can’t afford the pain
And there's no one left to blame
Without you
Without you

collection_content.title: Rise Above
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"After moving to Florida and ending a long-term relationship, I found myself caught between a new life and a growing pull toward something deeper. One quiet weekend in 2001, that tension turned into a song — the beginning of a personal journey of change I didn’t yet fully understand.","year":2001,"album_track_order":1,"version_type":"final","full_story":"After moving from Boston to Florida in 1999, I found myself starting over, and by 2001 — after ending a long-term relationship and moving into my own apartment in Boynton Beach — I was caught between the excitement of a new social life and a quiet pull toward something deeper. While spending weekends on Clematis Street in West Palm Beach with new friends, I began to feel a tug in my heart that I didn’t yet recognize as the Holy Spirit, only a growing sense that there was a better way to live. One summer weekend in 2001, I stayed in my apartment with a cheap electric guitar and wrote “Rise Above,” a song born from that inner tension. It marked the beginning of a long personal journey of confronting my own sin and understanding how it shaped both my life and the lives of those around me.","lyrics":"Forgive me Jesus for I have sinned
I left my conscious crying for another life 
The one it’s never been
Holding fast now to the things I thought were right
I made it through another day       
and I’ll make it through the night

So look outside my friends and see what we have done
That face of a troubled man 
Brings forth the falling Son
Feel your destiny raging inside of your heart
To free those hopeless minds 
That tear us all apart

Rise above to a different time
Rise above where the angels shine
It ain’t easy if you can’t find love         
The time is now to rise above

It must seem strange to them as I wander in and out
Of a life worth living free of all the doubt     
Free to be the one you are and free to see the truth
This is going to be the hardest thing 
That we’ll ever have to do…you got to

Rise above to a different time
Rise above where the angels shine
It ain’t easy if you can’t find love                          
The time is now to rise above                   

Rise above to a different time
Rise above where the angels shine
It ain’t easy if you can’t find love                 
The time is now
Rise above hanging on real tight
Rise above with all your might
I give a shout to ones with love
Now’s the time   
Oh yeah oh yeah
The time is now to rise above","lrc_lyrics":"[00:14.18][Verse 1]
[00:14.18]Forgive me Jesus for I have sinned
[00:20.88]I left my conscious crying for another life
[00:25.00]The one it’s never been
[00:27.72]Holding fast now to the things I thought were right
[00:34.22]I made it through another day
[00:36.56]and I’ll make it through the night
[00:47.58][Verse 2]
[00:47.58]So look outside my friends and see what we have done
[00:54.18]That face of a troubled man
[00:56.48]Brings forth the falling Son
[01:00.82]Feel your destiny raging inside of your heart
[01:07.56]To free those hopeless minds
[01:09.84]That tear us all apart
[01:18.90][Chorus 1]
[01:18.90]Rise above to a different time
[01:22.28]Rise above where the angels shine
[01:25.46]It ain’t easy if you can’t find love
[01:28.32]The time is now to rise above
[01:42.52][Verse 3]
[01:42.52]It must seem strange to them as I wander in and out
[01:49.02]Of a life worth living free of all the doubt
[01:55.60]Free to be the one you are and free to see the truth
[02:02.18]This is going to be the hardest thing
[02:04.82]That we’ll ever have to do…you got to
[02:13.94][Chorus 2]
[02:13.94]Rise above to a different time
[02:17.30]Rise above where the angels shine
[02:20.48]It ain’t easy if you can’t find love
[02:23.34]The time is now to rise above
[02:40.80][Chorus 3]
[02:40.80]Rise above to a different time
[03:00.54]Rise above where the angels shine
[03:03.80]It ain’t easy if you can’t find love
[03:06.86]The time is now
[03:13.94][Bridge]
[03:13.94]Rise above hanging on real tight
[03:17.28]Rise above with all your might
[03:20.42]I give a shout to ones with love
[03:23.56]Now’s the time
[03:27.34]Oh yeah oh yeah
[03:34.20]The time is now to rise above","primary_quote":"Feel your destiny raging inside of your heart.","secondary_quote":"Rise above where the angels shine.","genre":"Country, Rock","bpm":144,"key_signature":"E Minor","record_label":"Imagine Peak Studios","pro":"ASCAP"}

collection_content.title: Tried (Live Acoustic)
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"A quiet confession of falling short, holding onto the hope that even the desire to try still matters.","year":2010,"album_track_order":12,"version_type":"final","full_story":"Over the years I had gone in and out of writing songs, but “Tried” came during a season of quiet conviction in the middle of my South Florida years. On the outside, life felt full — friends, movement, and constant noise — yet internally I was beginning to recognize the gap between who I was and who I believed I was meant to be. There were nights when everything slowed down and I felt the weight of missed opportunities to stand for something greater. “Tried” is not a song of resolution; it’s a confession. It captures the humility of admitting I had fallen short while still calling out to God, hoping that even in my weakness, the desire to try still mattered.","lyrics":"The road less traveled
Brings another day
The light settles on the road
It brings another day
For all my dreams
Oh well I think I’ll find my way

And the light settles on me
And the rain comes down again
And I could of stood for something
Oh Lord well I tried, oh Lord I tried

And the light settles on me
And the rain comes down again
And I could of stood for something
Oh well but I tried, oh Lord I tried
Lord I tried
Oh Lord I tried
Lord I tried
Oh Lord I tried

And the light settles on me
And the rain comes down again
And I could of stood for something
Oh Lord well I tried, oh Lord I tried
Lord I tried","lrc_lyrics":"[00:58.52][Verse 1]

[01:16.90]It brings another day

[01:29.14]Oh well I think I’ll find my way

collection_content.title: This Cycle
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"After years of living fast in South Florida, I began to feel an emptiness I couldn’t ignore. This song captures the moment I realized the patterns in my life had to change, and that breaking free would take more than good intentions.","year":2012,"album_track_order":6,"version_type":"final","full_story":"For years I lived a fast life in South Florida, surrounded by great friends and nonstop partying that created unforgettable moments but slowly wore me down physically and mentally. Even in the middle of it all, I felt an emptiness I couldn’t ignore. There were weekends when I would stay home alone in Delray Beach, playing guitar and searching for peace. I began realizing that certain patterns in my life were repeating themselves, and something had to change. “This Cycle” captures that turning point — the awareness that breaking free would require more than good intentions.","lyrics":"Lord knows I’m trying to bend
To break this cycle I’m living in
Feeling lost from all that’s been done
Like sitting stranded in the desert sun
Desperation is the only friend
To break this cycle I’m living in

Wounded man bleeding with pride
I’m going to shake this devil inside and say

No way I’m not going to be tempted today
Ok you might live it up without me              
So you say the party’s non-stop
But I’m not going out, I’m staying in, I’m closing my eyes
Until I break this cycle of mine 

Well I’ve been down that good time road
Another cycle got to break this mold
Looking back on the heels of that hell
Like sianara, goodbye, farewell
Isolation is the only friend
To break this cycle I’m living in

Wounded man bleeding with pride
I’m going to shake this devil inside and say

No way I’m not going to be tempted today
Ok you might live it up without me        
So you say the party’s non-stop
But I’m not going out, I’m staying in, I’m closing my eyes
Until I break this cycle of mine 
Oh yeah this cycle of mine

Ordinary life 
Feeling good all the time
Could it be all right
Staying home all night
I can’t forget the past It haunts me like 
That little red man sitting on my shoulder again

Wounded man bleeding with pride
I’m going to shake this devil inside and say

No way I’m not going to be tempted today
Ok you might live it up without me                 
So you say the party’s non-stop
But I’m not going out, I’m staying in, I’m closing my eyes        
Until I break, break, break
Break this cycle of mine

Oh yeah this cycle of mine
Oh yeah this cycle of mine…of mine","lrc_lyrics":"[00:16.26][Verse 1]
[00:16.26]Lord knows I’m trying to bend
[00:21.14]To break this cycle I’m living in
[00:26.56]Feeling lost from all that’s been done
[00:31.42]Like sitting stranded in the desert sun
[00:36.96]Desperation is the only friend
[00:41.82]To break this cycle I’m living in
[00:47.18]Wounded man bleeding with pride
[00:50.70]I’m going to shake this devil inside and say
[01:00.32]No way I’m not going to be tempted today
[01:10.42]Ok you might live it up without me
[01:17.08]So you say the party’s non-stop
[01:21.30]But I’m not going out, I’m staying in, I’m closing my eyes
[01:26.22]Until I break this cycle of mine
[01:35.48][Verse 2]
[01:35.48]Well I’ve been down that good time road
[01:38.88]Another cycle got to break this mold
[01:42.44]Looking back on the heels of that hell
[01:45.58]Like sianara, goodbye, farewell
[01:49.24]Isolation is the only friend
[01:52.44]To break this cycle I’m living in
[01:55.98]Wounded man bleeding with pride
[01:58.42]I’m going to shake this devil inside and say
[02:02.68]No way I’m not going to be tempted today
[02:09.56]Ok you might live it up without me
[02:16.22]So you say the party’s non-stop
[02:20.48]But I’m not going out, I’m staying in, I’m closing my eyes
[02:25.40]Until I break this cycle of mine
[02:29.26]Oh yeah this cycle of mine
[02:36.18][Bridge]
[02:36.18]Ordinary life
[02:39.26]Feeling good all the time
[02:42.86]Could it be all right
[02:46.20]Staying home all night
[02:49.48]I can’t forget the past It haunts me like
[02:54.54]That little red man sitting on my shoulder again
[03:11.14][Verse 3]
[03:11.14]Wounded man bleeding with pride
[03:14.56]I’m going to shake this devil inside and say
[03:20.10]No way I’m not going to be tempted today
[03:27.14]Ok you might live it up without me
[03:33.82]So you say the party’s non-stop
[03:38.08]But I’m not going out, I’m staying in, I’m closing my eyes
[03:42.94]Until I break, break, break
[03:48.52]Break this cycle of mine
[03:51.76]Oh yeah this cycle of mine
[03:58.50]Oh yeah this cycle of mine…of mine","primary_quote":"Lord knows I’m trying to bend.","secondary_quote":"Shake this devil inside.","genre":"Adult Contemporary","bpm":144,"key_signature":"C# Minor","record_label":"Imagine Peak Studios","pro":"ASCAP"}

collection_content.title: For You
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"A song about choosing love with intention — a reflection on commitment, sacrifice, and giving yourself fully to someone else.","year":2014,"album_track_order":7,"version_type":"final","full_story":"In 2014, while still living in Delray Beach, I traveled to Key West for Halloween and met a girl who worked as a dolphin trainer in Key Largo. We began a long-distance relationship that required frequent drives back and forth, but at the time no distance felt too far. During one weekend apart, feeling the weight of missing her, I wrote “For You” as a simple expression of devotion. The song reflects that willingness to go wherever love leads.","lyrics":"I left them on a mountain road
So many dreams ago
But your hill I’ll climb for sure
Over again

Your oceans couldn’t hold me back
Your heaven’s just another track
This here I know for sure
Our time is real

I’d climb any mountainside
I’d take any boat ride
I’d fly across the sky for you, for you

My running shoes are wearing thin
I got my old two-wheel schwin
I even got friends galore
So I’ll find my way

I’d run a thousand miles too
I’d take my bike through
I’d even hitch a ride for you, for you

But distance doesn’t matter
The only thing that does for sure
So listen here what matters
Is my love for you

I left them on a mountain road
So many dreams ago
But your hill I’ll climb for sure
Over again

Your oceans couldn’t hold me back
Your heaven’s just another track
This here I know for sure
Our time is real

I’d climb any mountainside
I’d take any boat ride
I’d fly across the sky for you, for you
For you","lrc_lyrics":"[00:08.26][Verse 1]
[00:08.26]I left them on a mountain road
[00:12.18]So many dreams ago
[00:15.70]But your hill I’ll climb for sure
[00:19.56]Over again
[00:23.16][Chorus 1]
[00:23.16]Your oceans couldn’t hold me back
[00:26.92]Your heaven’s just another track
[00:30.78]This here I know for sure
[00:34.36]Our time is real
[00:38.04][Verse 2]
[00:38.04]I’d climb any mountainside
[00:41.78]I’d take any boat ride
[00:45.50]I’d fly across the sky for you, for you
[00:56.68][Verse 3]
[00:56.68]My running shoes are wearing thin
[01:00.44]I got my old two-wheel schwin
[01:04.14]I even got friends galore
[01:07.84]So I’ll find my way
[01:11.50][Verse 4]
[01:11.50]I’d run a thousand miles too
[01:15.26]I’d take my bike through
[01:19.04]I’d even hitch a ride for you, for you
[01:31.08][Bridge]
[01:31.08]But distance doesn’t matter
[01:38.48]The only thing that does for sure
[01:45.94]So listen here what matters
[01:51.10]Is my love for you
[02:07.38][Verse 1 Repeat]
[02:07.38]I left them on a mountain road
[02:11.24]So many dreams ago
[02:14.78]But your hill I’ll climb for sure
[02:18.78]Over again
[02:22.24][Chorus 1 Repeat]
[02:22.24]Your oceans couldn’t hold me back
[02:25.98]Your heaven’s just another track
[02:29.86]This here I know for sure
[02:33.46]Our time is real
[02:42.74][Verse 2 Repeat]
[02:42.74]I’d climb any mountainside
[02:46.44]I’d take any boat ride
[02:50.18]I’d fly across the sky for you, for you","primary_quote":"Distance doesn’t matter.","secondary_quote":"I left them on a mountain road, so many dreams ago.","genre":"Adult Contemporary","bpm":129,"key_signature":"C Major","record_label":"Imagine Peak Studios","pro":"ASCAP"}

collection_content.title: It's Not Just Fate
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"A reflection on the realization that meaningful relationships aren’t built on chance, but through intention, effort, and daily commitment.","year":2015,"release_date":"2024-09-27","album_track_order":8,"version_type":"final","full_story":"In 2015, after months of traveling between Delray Beach and Key Largo, I wrestled with what it truly takes to sustain something meaningful across distance. The excitement of how we met was real, but once that intensity settled, it became clear that love requires daily effort and sacrifice. I ultimately chose to move to Key Largo to give the relationship a real chance, even though it didn’t last. “It’s Not Just Fate” reflects the realization that meaningful relationships are built intentionally, not left to chance.","lyrics":"When a moment comes crashing in your life 
Takes you away 
Takes you away 
You try to capture it like those pictures on your wall 
Fades away 
Fades away 

You try to hold it 
You can’t ignore it 
It's time we just showed it's not just fate 
That keeps you hanging on 

I guess there comes a time when we gotta make our way 
Will we live for love 
Can we break these chains 
The simple fact is we can’t do it on our own 
Will we make something of this 
Will we let it all go 

We try to hold it 
We can’t ignore it 
It's time we just showed it's not just fate 
That keeps you hanging on 

It's not just fate 
That keeps you hanging on 
It's not just fate 
That keeps you hanging on 

Miles behind us 
Heaven guides us 
But that ain't enough just to bring it all back again 
It ain't a problem we can just solve this 
If we realize 
And just recognize 
It's not just fate 
It's not just fate 

We try to hold it 
We can’t ignore it 
It's time we just showed it's not just fate 
That keeps you hanging on 

Well this life is too short 
So let's bring it all back again to find a way 
To make it right here 
Well let's bring it all back again to find a way 
Cause I can tell you 
It's not just fate 
That keeps you hanging on","lrc_lyrics":"[00:25.20][Verse 1]
[00:25.20]When a moment comes crashing in your life

[00:31.12]Takes you away

[00:38.60]Fades away

[00:45.16]You try to hold it

[00:54.98]It's time we just showed
[00:56.82]It's not just fate
[01:01.16]That keeps you hanging on

[01:39.08]We can’t ignore it

[01:56.18]It's not just fate
[01:59.92]That keeps you hanging on
[02:05.98]It's not just fate

collection_content.title: Surrender
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"Written at a breaking point, this song reflects surrender — letting go of control and trusting God when there’s nothing left to hold onto.","year":2024,"album_track_order":4,"version_type":"final","full_story":"By 2023 I had reached the lowest point of my life. Living in Charleston, SC, I was in the middle of a painful custody battle and experiencing a season when I had little contact with my children. I felt completely broken and had nowhere to turn but to God. I spent the next year in church, learning who Jesus truly is and praying for His mercy and grace. After nearly seven years away from music, I picked up my guitar one quiet weekend and wrote “Surrender” as an honest expression of letting go of control and trusting God with what I could not fix on my own.","lyrics":"You got to surrender now
Bring it to your knees
And, ask the Lord for all of His forgiveness
You know mercy’s all of His
Grace is what He gives
Watch Him wrap His love all around you

You got to give up
And walk this faithful line
He never said the road won’t be windy
You’re riding shotgun on His wings
You’re leaving everything
The Holy Ghost it grows inside you
You just got to surrender
You got to surrender
 
His mighty will is always right
His mighty will can win the fight
You got to let Him in your heart
And He said, have your faith in all of Me
Have your love shine bright
You couldn’t wait another night

You got to give up
And walk this faithful line
He never said the road won’t be windy
You’re riding shotgun on His wings
You’re leaving everything
The Holy Ghost it grows inside you
It grows inside you

Walking my way, finding my way
Always been the same, just an empty soul
Now I’m walking Your way
Down that narrow road. 
Praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!

You got to give up
And walk this faithful line
He never said the road won’t be windy
You’re riding shotgun on His wings
You’re leaving everything
The Holy Ghost it grows inside you
You just got to surrender
You got to surrender

You got to surrender now
Bring it to your knees
And, ask the Lord for His forgiveness","lrc_lyrics":"[00:13.80][Verse 1]
[00:13.80]You got to surrender now
[00:16.36]Bring it to your knees
[00:19.24]And, ask the Lord for all of His forgiveness
[00:25.48]You know mercy’s all of His
[00:29.30]Grace is what He gives
[00:32.54]Watch Him wrap His love all around you
[00:38.48]You got to give up
[00:42.10]And walk this faithful line
[00:45.38]He never said the road won’t be windy
[00:51.42]You’re riding shotgun on His wings
[00:55.10]You’re leaving everything
[00:58.34]The Holy Ghost it grows inside you
[01:03.68]You just got to surrender
[01:10.54]You got to surrender
[01:14.36][Chorus 1]
[01:14.36]His mighty will is always right
[01:18.78]His mighty will can win the fight
[01:25.14]You got to let Him in your heart
[01:29.90]And He said, have your faith in all of Me
[01:34.78]Have your love shine bright
[01:38.46]You couldn’t wait another night

collection_content.title: Heaven's Calling
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"Written in a season of brokenness and uncertainty, this song reflects the realization that even in life’s darkest moments, God is calling you back to Him.","year":2025,"release_date":"2025-04-28","album_track_order":9,"version_type":"final","full_story":"Coming out of a season marked by divorce and legal battles, everything around me felt unstable. It wasn’t just that I felt broken — my situation was broken. The future felt uncertain, relationships were strained, and the life I thought I had built was unraveling. In that turmoil, I began to see that my move to Charleston was not random but purposeful. I came to understand that in times of trouble — when circumstances fall apart and control slips away — that is often when God calls the loudest. As I continued writing, the message became clear: no matter how far someone runs or how fractured their world becomes, God is calling them by name. “Heaven’s Calling” captures that realization and became the first song I ever had professionally produced and recorded.","lyrics":"The times are calling 
Heaven open up your gate 
Let your mind be free to follow 
And if your falling 
He’ll pick you right up where you belong 
In the arms of Heaven’s calling 

You can’t run away 
He’s got His eyes on you 
You can’t run away 
There’s nothing else you can do 
So when your heart is bawling 
You know that Heaven’s calling out your name 

When doubt is rising 
And the world feels black and cold 
Open up your heart to follow 
And if you’re wondering 
Does He love us all the same 
In the eyes of Heaven’s calling 

You can’t run away 
He’s got His eyes on you 
I can’t run away no no 
There’s nothing else we can do 
So when my heart is bawling 
You know that Heaven’s calling out my name 

Let the light break through the clouds 
Feel the fire in your soul 
Heaven's calling out your name 
You’ll never be the same 

The times are calling 
Heaven open up your gate 
Let your mind be free to follow 
And if your falling 
He’ll put you right back where you belong 
In the arms of Heaven’s calling 
Oh no, Heaven’s calling 
Oh no, Heaven’s calling 
Oh no, Heaven’s calling out your name 
Heaven’s calling","lrc_lyrics":"[00:34.50][Verse 1]
[00:34.50]The times are calling
[00:38.28]Heaven open up your gate
[00:41.94]Let your mind be free to follow
[00:49.02]And if your falling
[00:52.52]He’ll pick you right up where you belong

[01:02.96][Chorus 1]
[01:02.96]You can’t run away

[03:31.60]In the arms of Heaven’s calling
[03:38.78][Outro]
[03:38.78]Oh no, Heaven’s calling
[03:46.00]Oh no, Heaven’s calling
[03:53.32]Oh no, Heaven’s calling out your name

collection_content.title: For Granted
collection_content.metadata:
{"featured_song":false,"short_description":"A reflection on gratitude and presence, reminding us not to overlook the simple moments that matter most.","year":2025,"album_track_order":10,"version_type":"final","full_story":"After returning to music during a difficult season of divorce and custody, I was blessed with regular, meaningful time with my children. Those simple moments — waking them up, carrying them downstairs, watching them grow — took on deeper significance. I realized how easy it is to overlook everyday blessings until they are almost taken away. “For Granted” was written from a place of gratitude and awareness, a reminder to slow down and appreciate what is right in front of you.","lyrics":"When I wake you in the morning
I see myself before me
As you hold that lovie tight
I carry you down the stairs
Show you that I care
I got that blanket you held all night
If I can bottle it up
You know that love is enough
To keep these memories alive

Open your eyes
Try to realize
A moment’s arrived
You gotta let it all go
Breathe it in slow
Don’t ever take this life for granted
Oh no let it all go 
Don’t take this for granted
Oh no breathe it in slow 
Don’t take this for granted

I saw what life was doing
As you struggled through it
Couldn’t even stand without our help
Dignity was shaken
My heart was over taken
God I know there’s something else
We gotta bottle it up
You know His love is enough
To keep that spirit here alive

Open your eyes
Try to realize
A moment’s arrived
You gotta let it all go
Breathe it in slow
Don’t ever take this life for granted
Oh no let it all go 
Don’t take this for granted
Oh no breathe it in slow 
Don’t take this for granted

We get our shot at living
Get lost forgetting
Heaven knows if you tried
So be a good man
Love them all you can
And never take this life for granted

Open your eyes
Try to realize
A moment’s arrived
You gotta let it all go
Breathe it in slow
Don’t ever take this life for granted
Oh no let it all go 
Don’t take this for granted
Oh no breathe it in slow 
Don’t take this for granted","lrc_lyrics":"[00:15.68][Verse 1]
